keyFeatures.en: Automatically remove image backgrounds in 5 seconds with one click.
keyFeatures.zh: 一键自动移除图片背景，5秒内完成。

keyFeatures.en: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP image formats.

description.en: Remove image backgrounds for free with up to 0.25 megapixels and 22 MB file size limit.
description.zh: 免费移除图片背景，支持0.25兆像素以下的图片，文件大小限制为22MB。

weaknesses.en: Limited to 0.25 megapixels for free tier, which may not be suitable for high-resolution images.
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐仅支持0.25兆像素，对于高分辨率图片可能不适用。

weaknesses.en: Limited to 22 MB file size, which may not be sufficient for larger images.
weaknesses.zh: 文件大小限制为22MB，对于较大的图片可能不够。

targetAudience.en: Individual users and small businesses who need to remove backgrounds from images quickly and easily.
targetAudience.zh: 需要快速轻松移除图片背景的个人用户和小型企业。

positioning.en: remove.bg positions itself as a user-friendly and efficient tool for automatically removing image backgrounds.
positioning.zh: remove.bg将自己定位为一个用户友好且高效的自动移除图片背景的工具。
